sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_normalize (input String, normalized String) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE test_normalize SET normalized = normalizeUTF8NFC(input) WHERE input LIKE '%â%';
SELECT input, normalized, length(normalized) AS nfc_len FROM test_normalize;
SELECT input, normalizeUTF8NFC(input) AS nfc_version FROM test_normalize WHERE length(normalized) < 5;
